creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Few ideas for improvements:

- GH_PROJECT defaults to PORTNAME, no need to set it
- Echoing stuff in post-install will only show info to users
  building from ports. This could be converted to pkg-message
  so that both ports and package users will see it and it
  makes Makefile less cluttered.
- Portlint issues some warnings. Please check your work with
  ports-mgmt/portlint before submitting.
